reach_why: Recursive evaluator failure and misaligned search narrowing are known concerns; surreal facts add framing, not new territory.
novelty_why: It links self-judgment failure, search-space miscounting, and detached heuristics into one cautionary picture.
falsifiable_why: Claims can be tested by recursive systems outperforming despite evaluator flaws, or by counterexamples separating narrowing from distortion.
explanation: Self-improvement can amplify evaluator errors, making efficient search converge on self-approved but wrong outputs.
